Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, oh! Spotted a new set of targets![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}What're you waitin' for, Sanada-san? Show us what you got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Hey, Nobuko. Are those boys looking at us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Wow, Yoshie, I'm surprised you could see from over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}All right, time to get in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}S-Sorry to bother you, but, um... I-I wanted to ask you something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Ahaha, are you hitting on us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}We just thought that if you're bored, you might wanna talk, or...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}A chance meeting like this might stir things up for both of us, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Um, isn't that what it means to hit on someone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Haven't you heard? It's lame to hit on girls at the beach nowadays.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Aw, come on. We were bored anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Besides, they look kinda cool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Hey, how old do we look to you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}The same as you? That's crap and you know it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}They were just trying to be nice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We've actually been out of college a few years now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Seriously? We still look that young?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Aw, I'm so happy to hear that! Even if it's just flattery.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}To tell you the truth, we're actually older than that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}No, wait, that's fine by us! Older women are more mature and experienced and stuff![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Y'know, you're a pretty smooth talker for someone so young.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}How old are you guys, anyway?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'll be graduating next year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Oh gosh. That's more of an age gap than I was expecting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}See? It's not gonna work out. Besides, I doubt you're having any fun talking to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}I don't think there's anything we could chat about that you'd find interesting. Unless you wanna hear me complain about my boss?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Uh, complaining about your boss... That might be fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You're not very good at lying, are you? You really don't have to try so hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Yoshie! Don't ruin the conversation![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}He said it might be fun, so just play along![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}What do you mean, Yoshie? He was just kidding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Nobuko, you need to stop being so nice to everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Aww, c'mon! It's been ages since I've done this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You've teased these kids enough. We should head back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}They're gonna be waiting on us, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}"They"...? You mean, you have boyfriends?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Oh, right. Sorry, forgot to mention that. Well, we gotta go now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We're meeting our boyfriends back at the villa for a barbecue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}What happened!? We looked like a bunch of idiots![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}And you! You haven't been pullin' your weight either![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}You gotta come through on the next one, you hear me?[n]{f 1 1}
